'''Mien Rumba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] who was a former [[Miner/Legends|miner]] wanted by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] for stealing jewels and selling them off.

==Posted Bounty==
*'''Wanted Dead Or Alive:''' Mien Rumba
*'''Alive:''' 4000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Credits]]
*'''Dead:''' 2000 Credits
*'''Species:''' Sullustan
*'''Sex:''' Male
*'''Known Affliates:''' Black market precious mineral dealers
*'''Last Known Location:''' [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*'''Brief:''' Former miner wanted for stealing precious gems and selling them on the side.
*'''Originator:''' Sorosuub Corporation

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
